title: [phase:repair] [family:checkpoint] [provider_hint:codex] Current task: openclaw-tmux replacement. In 4 bullets max, produce a checkpoint of the current prototype state: done, remaining blockers, safest next action, and one verification command already passing. No edits.
summary_text: - **Runtime auth still blocks execution:** installing `nlm` does not provision an authenticated NotebookLM session, so `check-notebooklm-runtime-readiness.sh` (`LIVE_SMOKE_MODE=required`, `EXECUTE_LIVE_MODE=required`) can still fail at real `notebook/mindmap` create calls. - **`@latest` is non-deterministic and can break contract:** `go install github.com/tmc/nlm/cmd/nlm@latest` can pull a changed CLI at any run (flags/output/schema drift), which can break adapter assumptions and make canary pass/fail unstable across runs.
